Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert F. Cohen, Esq. of the Law Office of Robert Cohen, Tel. 310.858.9771, specially appearing for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Plaintiff's request for continuance was denied. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement is off calendar for failure to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Through tentative rulings issued on April 2, 2013, and April 24, 2013, the Court ordered the moving party to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers. No courtesy copies were provided. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Continued To May-14-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement is Continued on the court's own motion to May 14, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 24, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Continued To Apr-24-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 2, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
